questions.question: Which of the following is a time complexity of Merge Sort?
questions.explanation: Merge Sort has a time complexity of O(n log n) due to the divide-and-conquer approach and the merging process.

questions.question: What is the average time complexity of Quick Sort?
questions.explanation: Quick Sort has an average time complexity of O(n log n) due to the divide-and-conquer approach, but it can degrade to O(n^2) in the worst case.

questions.question: Which of the following is a property of Binary Tree Traversals?
options: In-order traversal visits parent before child
Pre-order traversal visits parent after child
Post-order traversal visits child before parent
In-order traversal visits left then right then parent
questions.explanation: In-order traversal visits the left subtree, the current node, and then the right subtree, while pre-order traversal visits the current node and then the left and right subtrees.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of Multiplication of Large Integers using the Karatsuba algorithm?
questions.explanation: The Karatsuba algorithm has a time complexity of O(n^2 log n) due to the recursive division of the large integers.

questions.question: How many operations does Strassen's Matrix Multiplication algorithm perform?
questions.explanation: Strassen's Matrix Multiplication algorithm performs O(n^2.81) operations, which can be as low as O(n^3/2) for some values of n.
